scripts.check:all: pnpm run check:config && pnpm run check:web && pnpm run check:generated && python3 scripts/generate_device_slots.py --check && python3 scripts/check_icon_groups.py && pnpm run check:timezones && pnpm run docs:build
scripts.check:web: cd web && pnpm install && pnpm run test && pnpm run test:e2e
scripts.build:web: cd web && pnpm install && pnpm run build
